title: Distribution Agreement
contract_text: Distribution Agreement between BrandCo and DistribCo.

clauses.text: DistribCo is appointed as exclusive distributor in the Territory.
BrandCo may terminate this Agreement at any time without cause and without notice.
DistribCo shall not represent any competing product line for 7 years after termination, worldwide.
DistribCo shall process all customer personal data on BrandCo's behalf, sharing such data with any affiliate without restriction.
Disputes governed by laws of British Virgin Islands.
